entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for adaptation to harsh environments in Rajasthan

entities.name: ADAPTIVE PLANT TRAITS
entities.description: Morpho-physiological and developmental characteristics that enhance plant adaptation to stress

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by lack of water affecting crop growth

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in India where the study on pearl millet adaptation was conducted

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify environmental and genotypic causes of variation in plant performance

entities.name: DROUGHT PATTERNS
entities.description: The specific temporal and spatial occurrences of drought stress in an environment

entities.name: FARMER PREFERENCES
entities.description: The attitudes and desired plant characteristics as perceived by local farmers

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT TRIAL
entities.description: A trial conducted across various environments to obtain GxE interaction data

entities.name: VILLAGE STUDIES
entities.description: Field-level studies used to gather information on farmer responses and preferences

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in a plant, serving as an escape mechanism

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress that occurs during the reproductive stage at the end of the growing season

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to alter its development in response to unpredictable environmental stress

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait that allows the plant to complete its life cycle before the onset of severe drought

entities.name: PANICLE SIZE
entities.description: A yield component of pearl millet preferred by farmers in wet areas

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The production of side shoots, preferred in drier areas to stabilize yield and improve fodder

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production of the crop

entities.name: FODDER VALUE
entities.description: The quality and quantity of the crop used as animal feed

entities.name: FODDER LEGUME
entities.description: A legume crop grown primarily for animal fodder

entities.name: DUAL-PURPOSE LEGUME
entities.description: A legume crop used for both grain and fodder production

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount and distribution of precipitation affecting the farming system

entities.name: PLANT-AVAILABLE SOIL WATER
entities.description: The portion of soil water that can be absorbed by plant roots

entities.name: RAINFALL DATA
entities.description: Long-term precipitation records used to estimate drought patterns
